frontmatter.name: doc-for-agent
frontmatter.description: Repository documentation workflow adapter for compatible coding agents.

default_description: Repository documentation workflow adapter for a compatible agent surface. Use it to initialize wiring and refresh agent/human docs from the real repository structure.
post_install_notes: Use `docagent init --ai continue` as the recommended product entry for this platform.
Reload Continue so the skill bundle is picked up by the next assistant session.
Keep the install in the repository root when you want the project to carry its own assistant wrapper.
